steps.title: Read the intersection
steps.content: For a graphed system, the solution is where the two lines cross.

steps.title: Write the ordered pair
steps.content: The graph shows the intersection at $x=4$ and $y=-5$, so the solution is $(4,-5)$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: The result is correct. The other choices are other visible coordinates, but they are not the point where both lines intersect.
